_meta.note: Customer-facing strings for the SwiftUI installer GUI. Lifted from inline Text()/Button()/Label() literals per Rule 0.9 (strings extractable from day one). v1.0 ships English-only; v1.2 translation drops a parallel ViewCopy.{lang}.json next to this file. Interpolation uses Python-style {name} placeholders; the ViewCopy loader's string(for:fills:) helper substitutes them at render time. ZERO em-dashes and ZERO ASCII '--' in customer-rendered strings (use a comma, full stop, or rephrase). En-dashes with spaces around them are allowed in display-only contexts (logs, version strings).

device_registration_error.heading: We could not register this Mac

admin_access_required.heading: Administrator access required
admin_access_required.prompt_reason: Ostler needs administrator access to install required software and keep your Mac awake during setup.
admin_access_required.reassurance: Your password stays on this Mac, never sent anywhere. macOS will ask for it on the next screen.

install_failed_banner.heading: Install failed
install_failed_banner.subtitle_default: Something went wrong during install. Email support@ostler.ai with the redacted log, or use Copy log to grab the raw details.
install_failed_banner.mailto_body_preamble:
Hi Ostler team,

The Ostler installer failed during install. The redacted log below shows what happened. We will reply within one working day.
install_failed_banner.raw_copy_confirm_body: This log contains your name, email and contact information. Are you sure you want to copy the raw log to your clipboard? Most users should use the Email support button instead, which redacts sensitive details automatically.

license_entry.heading: Your licence
license_entry.intro: Ostler needs a licence file before it can install. The licence arrived in your welcome email from hello@ostler.ai. Save the attached file (it looks like `ostler-licence.json`), then drag it here, or paste the JSON contents below.
license_entry.paste_empty_error: Paste the licence JSON above first, or drop the file onto the box.
license_entry.footer_hint: Your licence stays on this Mac. It is verified locally with a key built into this installer. No network call is made during this step.
license_entry.read_file_error: Could not read the licence file at {filename}.
license_entry.signature_invalid_error: Signature check failed. This file is not a licence we signed, or it was edited after delivery.
license_entry.expired_error: Your licence expired on {expires_at}. Email hello@ostler.ai to renew.
license_entry.short_id_guidance: That looks like a Licence ID, not the full licence. Please drag the licence file (ostler-licence.json) from your welcome email into the box above, or paste its full JSON contents here. If you cannot find the email, contact hello@ostler.ai.
license_entry.id_label: Or paste your Stripe session id (cs_...) or licence URL
license_entry.id_unrecognised: That does not look like a Stripe session id, licence URL, or licence id. Drag your ostler-licence.json onto the box above instead.
license_entry.fetch_not_ready: Your licence is not ready yet. Wait a minute and try again, or use the licence file from your welcome email.
license_entry.fetch_revoked: This licence is no longer valid. Please contact hello@ostler.ai.
license_entry.fetch_signed_json_missing: We could not retrieve your licence body. Please use the ostler-licence.json file from your welcome email, or contact hello@ostler.ai.
license_entry.fetch_http_error: Could not fetch your licence (server returned {status}). Please use the ostler-licence.json file from your welcome email, or try again later.
license_entry.fetch_transport_error: Could not reach appcast.ostler.ai ({reason}). Check your network connection, or use the ostler-licence.json file from your welcome email.

device_limit.heading: This licence is on {count} Macs
device_limit.explanation: Each Ostler licence is valid on up to {max} Macs. This one is already at the limit, so we cannot register this Mac without freeing up a slot first.
device_limit.bullet_email_us: Email us at hello@ostler.ai and we will free a slot for you. Quote your licence id below.
device_limit.bullet_buy_another: Or purchase an additional licence at ostler.ai if this is a new Mac you want to keep alongside your other ones.
device_limit.mailto_subject: Free up a slot for licence {license_id}
device_limit.mailto_body:
Hi Ostler team,

I have hit the device limit on my licence and would like to free up a slot so I can install on this Mac.

Licence id: {license_id}

Thanks.

fda_sheet.heading: Full Disk Access required
fda_sheet.reason_default: Ostler reads Safari, iMessage, Notes, Mail, Calendar, Photos and Reminders from local macOS databases.
fda_sheet.instructions: Open System Settings, find Full Disk Access in the Privacy & Security section, and tick OstlerInstaller. Then come back here and tap Continue.

onboarding_question.back_tooltip_default: Review previous answers. Editing is disabled in this version.
onboarding_question.error_empty_text: Please enter a value to continue.
onboarding_question.error_empty_choice: Please pick one of the options.
onboarding_question.assistant_name_helper: Pick anything, they will respond to it. Some Ostler operators have gone with Samantha, Friday, Joshua, or Marvin.
onboarding_question._exempt_assistant_name_helper: assistant-name-exempt: F6.1 suggestion-pool exemplar, not a default
onboarding_question.fda_preset_recommended_subtitle: Most people start here. Includes Contacts, Calendar, Apple Mail, Messages, Safari history and bookmarks, Notes, Reminders, and your Documents folder. Sensitive sources like Photos face recognition stay off.
onboarding_question.fda_preset_everything_subtitle: Every data source Ostler supports. Adds Photos library (including face recognition), Mail attachments, Voice Memos, Apple Music listening history, Health app data, and Screen Time activity. Best for power users who want maximum personalisation.
onboarding_question.fda_preset_customise_subtitle: Pick each source individually. You can choose exactly which apps Ostler reads from, and turn anything on or off later in the Doctor section of the app.
onboarding_question.consent_install_body_prefix: By clicking Install Ostler, you confirm you accept the

assistant_name_suggestions.comma_separated: Marvin, Samantha, Joshua, Friday, Alfred, Wadsworth, Beatrix, Penelope, Watson, Reginald, Atlas, Ada
assistant_name_suggestions._exempt_suggestions: assistant-name-exempt: brand-warm pool of suggestion options shown to the customer at install time. Customer picks their own.

contact_card_lookup.status_line: Please wait a moment, reading your contacts to pre-fill your details...

preinstall_wrapup.heading: All set
preinstall_wrapup.body: You can leave the installer running on its own from here. Go and make a cup of tea.
